character.name: Female ranger, long wild white-silver
character.prompt:
Female ranger, long wild white-silver hair, athletic build. Brown
leather chest armor, leather pants, tall brown boots. Holding a
wooden recurve bow, arrow quiver strapped to back. Cold-blue accent
(#7BA7BC) on arrow tips only. Feral, wilderness hunter. No purple,
no orange. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy
black outline, muted palette with cold-blue arrow accent, transparent
background.
